{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Archlord prize vaults
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Participants will be led to the [[Archlord prize vaults]] in the morning.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Archlord]] vaults are located within the [[Ninecloud Court]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"In the morning, you will be led to the Archlord prize vaults, from which you will select one sacred instrument of your choosing."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
